title: Adventure Star: Roll of Fate
description: Navigate through 4 progressively challenging grid-based levels to reach the Star's Core. Move tile by tile, interact with mysterious events using Space, and manage your HP carefully. Each event is influenced by fate—will luck be on your side? Collect treasures, avoid traps, and reach the exit of each level to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys or WASD: Move one tile Up/Left/Down/Right
Space: Interact with event tiles (stand on them and press Space)
Enter: Start the game from main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart (returns to main menu from game over screen)

title: AquaSort Puzzle
description: Welcome to AquaSort Puzzle! Your goal is to sort colored liquids into tubes so that each tube contains only one color. Select a source tube, then pour its contents into a compatible destination tube. You can only pour if the colors match or the destination is empty, and there's enough space. Complete all 5 levels with strategic moves to win!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Navigate between tubes
Space: Select tube to pour from, then select destination to pour into
Z: Undo last move
ESC: Pause/Resume game
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
R: Restart (returns to start screen from game over)

title: Bubble Cash
description: Welcome to Bubble Cash! Clear all the colored bubbles from the board before time runs out. Aim your bubble shooter to match 3 or more bubbles of the same color to pop them. Make strategic shots to create chain reactions and cause bubbles to detach and fall for bonus points. Complete all 3 increasingly challenging levels to win the game!
controls:
Arrow Left: Rotate shooter left
Arrow Right: Rotate shooter right
Space: Fire bubble
Z: Swap current bubble with next bubble
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Connect Cascade
description: Connect Cascade is a color-matching puzzle game where you connect adjacent dots of the same color to clear them from the grid. Form squares to clear all dots of that color! Complete level objectives like clearing specific colored dots or dropping anchors to the bottom before running out of moves. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels that test your strategic thinking and pattern recognition.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor across the grid
Space (Hold): Select dot and extend path to adjacent same-colored dots
Space (Release): Confirm and clear the connected path
Shift (while holding Space): Cancel current path selection
Enter: Start game from main menu
Escape: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Fling Feathers Blitz
description: Fling Feathers Blitz is a physics-based puzzle game where you launch birds from a slingshot to destroy structures and eliminate all pigs on each level. Master the unique abilities of different bird types - Red birds are basic projectiles, Blue birds split into three, and Yellow birds boost their speed mid-flight. Complete all 5 levels by strategically using your limited birds to topple wooden and stone structures, earning points for destruction and bonus points for unused birds. Each level increases in difficulty with more complex structures and better-protected pigs!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
SPACE: Hold to grab and aim the slingshot, release to launch the bird
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT): Adjust slingshot aim while holding SPACE
Z: Activate the current bird's special ability while in flight
ESC: Pause or unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the start screen
originalGameName: アングリーバード 2 (Angry Birds 2)

title: Geometry Dash
description: Geometry Dash is a rhythm-based platformer where you control a geometric icon that automatically moves forward. Navigate through obstacles, spikes, and platforms by jumping at the right time. Progress through increasingly difficult sections, switching between different movement modes. The goal is to reach the end of the level without crashing into any obstacles.
controls:
SPACE/UP ARROW: Jump (in cube mode) or fly up (in ship mode)
ENTER: Start the game from the title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart the game when game over

title: Gravity Guide
description: Guide falling objects into the target zone at the bottom of the screen using your platform. Complete 5 increasingly challenging levels by successfully catching the required number of objects before time runs out. Watch out for obstacles that block your path, and adapt to moving targets in later levels. Precision and timing are key!
controls:
Arrow Left: Move platform left
Arrow Right: Move platform right
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Gridlock Duel
description: Challenge an AI opponent in this strategic grid-based battle! Place your X marks strategically to form a line before the AI completes its O line. Progress through 5 increasingly difficult levels with larger grids and smarter AI opponents. Win rounds to advance, earn points, and set a high score. One mistake means starting over from Level 1!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate the grid cursor to select cells
Space or Z: Place your X mark in the selected cell
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to title screen

title: Heroic Impact Arena
description: Command a team of 3 Heroes in tactical turn-based combat against waves of Villains across 5 challenging levels. Select your Heroes, choose their abilities wisely, and target enemies strategically. Master the elemental system where Fire beats Nature, Nature beats Water, and Water beats Fire. Manage ability cooldowns and status effects to emerge victorious. Defeat all enemies to progress through levels and achieve the highest score!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Select Hero (in character select) or Target (in target select)
Arrow Up/Down: Select Ability (in ability select)
Space: Confirm selection or execute action
Z: Cancel current selection and go back
Shift: End current player turn early
Enter: Start game from main menu
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
originalGameName: 僕のヒーローアカデミア ULTRA IMPACT

title: Fruit Merge
description: Drop and merge identical fruits to create bigger ones! Start with cherries and work your way up to the ultimate watermelon. Carefully position each fruit before dropping it into the container. When two matching fruits touch, they combine into the next fruit in the sequence. Keep all fruits below the danger line at the top - if any fruit crosses it for too long, it's game over! Score points with every merge and aim for the highest score possible.
controls:
Arrow Left/A: Move fruit left
Arrow Right/D: Move fruit right
Arrow Down/S: Drop fruit faster
SPACE: Quick drop fruit
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: Battle Zone
description: Battle Zone is a top-down tactical shooter where you control an elite soldier navigating a dangerous battlefield. Eliminate enemy soldiers while avoiding their fire and collecting ammo. Complete the mission by eliminating all enemies or reaching the extraction point. Watch your health and ammunition - tactical positioning and smart resource management are key to victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your soldier in four directions
Z: Fire weapon
SPACE: Sprint (faster movement with reduced accuracy)
SHIFT: Take cover/crouch (reduced movement speed but improved accuracy)
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game after victory or defeat

title: Tanks Battle Royale
description: Battle Royale FPS Arena: You are a soldier in a competitive arena match. Eliminate enemy soldiers to earn XP and unlock weapon upgrades. Survive waves of increasingly skilled opponents while collecting ammo and health packs. Reach level 5 to win the match! Watch your health and ammo carefully.
controls: Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward/strafe left/right | Space: Shoot weapon | Shift: Sprint (2x speed) | Z: Reload weapon | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

title: Piano Game
description: Magic Tiles is a rhythm-based game where you must tap black tiles as they scroll down the screen while avoiding white tiles. Each correctly tapped black tile awards points and continues your combo. Miss a black tile or tap a white tile, and you lose. The game progressively gets faster, challenging your reflexes and timing. How long can you keep up with the increasing difficulty?
controls:
DOWN ARROW: Tap the leftmost lane (column 1)
LEFT ARROW: Tap the second lane from left (column 2)
UP ARROW: Tap the third lane from left (column 3)
RIGHT ARROW: Tap the rightmost lane (column 4)
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart the game (works on game over screen)

title: Pixel Drift Race
description: Race through increasingly challenging tracks in this top-down arcade racer! Navigate your car through traffic, avoid obstacles, and master the art of drifting. Progress through suburban streets, busy city roads, and treacherous mountain passes before facing off against the ultimate boss car. Collect cash to upgrade your vehicle's engine, acceleration, and handling. Complete each level without losing all your health to advance. Can you defeat The Enforcer and claim victory?
controls:
Arrow Up / W: Accelerate (hold to maintain speed)
Arrow Left / A: Steer Left
Arrow Right / D: Steer Right
Space: Hard Brake / Drift (hold while turning for drift bonus)
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Rhythm Runner
description: Welcome to Rhythm Runner! Guide your character through an endless musical highway where notes stream toward you from the right. Hit the notes with perfect timing using the arrow keys to score points and build combos. Each successful hit charges your special ability meter. Collect power-ups to unlock unique Elfin companions that boost your score multiplier. Miss too many notes and it's game over!
controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Hit notes in the corresponding lane when they reach the hit zone
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Switch between upper and lower lanes
Shift: Activate special ability (when meter is full)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Royal Kingdom
description: Welcome to Royal Kingdom! Match colorful tiles to complete challenging objectives across 5 progressive levels. Create matches of 3 or more identical tiles by swapping adjacent pieces. Form matches of 4 tiles to create powerful Rockets that clear entire rows or columns, or match 5+ tiles to generate Bombs that explode in a 3x3 area! Break through Ice Blocks, destroy Chained Tiles, and collect special Target Items to complete each level's objectives before running out of moves. Plan your moves carefully and create cascading matches for bonus points!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor to select tiles
Space: Select tile / Swap with selected tile / Activate special piece
WASD: Alternative movement keys (W=Up, A=Left, S=Down, D=Right)
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause / Unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)

title: Shadow Blade Ascent
description: Shadow Blade Ascent is a 2D side-scrolling action RPG where you control a shadow knight through 5 increasingly challenging levels. Battle waves of shadow enemies, defeat powerful bosses, and level up your character to unlock new skills. Collect gold for points, use health and mana potions strategically, and master your combat abilities including attacks, dodges, and special skills. Your goal is to defeat all 5 bosses and conquer the Dark Lord's Throne Room!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left/right
Arrow Up: Jump (or climb up when on ladder)
Arrow Down: Drop through platform (or climb down when on ladder)
Z: Basic Attack
Shift: Dodge/Dash (grants brief invulnerability)
Space: Special Skill 1 (close-range area attack)
W: Special Skill 2 (ranged projectile, unlocked at level 2)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Shadow Takedown: Ninja Stealth
description: You are a master ninja assassin infiltrating enemy territory. Your mission: eliminate all primary targets marked in red while avoiding detection by patrolling guards. Use the shadows to your advantage, time your movements carefully, and utilize environmental tools like vents for quick escapes and explosive barrels for strategic eliminations. One mistake means mission failure—stay hidden, stay silent, and complete your objectives to become the ultimate Shadow Takedown master.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move ninja (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Context action - Silent takedown (near enemy) / Use vent (on vent) / Detonate barrel (near barrel)
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to main menu)

title: Shawarma Stack
description: Welcome to Shawarma Stack! You run a shawarma restaurant and must fulfill customer orders quickly and accurately. Each customer shows their order in a speech bubble - add the exact ingredients they request, then serve. Timely and perfect orders earn bonus points and maintain your reputation. If your reputation drops to 0% or you fail to meet level objectives, it's game over. Complete all 5 levels to become a Shawarma Legend!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select sauces (Up: Garlic Sauce, Down: Tahini Sauce)
Z: Add Meat
Space: Serve Order
ENTER: Start Game / Confirm
ESC: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart (from Game Over screen)
Shift: Quick pause toggle during gameplay

title: Snake io
description: Guide your snake through three challenging levels, consuming glowing pellets and defeating AI opponents to grow longer. Navigate carefully to avoid collisions with walls, obstacles, and other snakes. Reach the target length for each level to advance. Use your boost strategically to escape danger or chase opponents, but be careful—it costs you mass! Defeat AI snakes by making them crash into your body, then collect their remains to grow even larger.
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Turn your snake left or right
Space or Shift: Activate speed boost (costs mass)
Enter: Start game or confirm menu selections
Escape: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Spud Survivor
description: You are a brave potato survivor fighting waves of vegetable enemies! Your weapon auto-fires at the nearest threat. Survive increasingly difficult waves across 3 levels, collect experience to level up and gain powerful stat boosts, gather materials to purchase upgrades between levels, and defeat the final boss to claim victory. Stay mobile, manage your health, and become the ultimate Spud Survivor!
controls:
W: Move Up
A: Move Left
S: Move Down
D: Move Right
Shift: Dash (quick speed boost with cooldown)
Space: Confirm selection in menus
Enter: Start game from menu
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to menu from game over)

title: Subway Surfers
description: Navigate through an endless subway tunnel across three parallel tracks! Dodge trains, jump over barriers, slide under obstacles, and collect coins while running at increasing speeds. Complete all 5 challenging levels by reaching distance goals. Collect power-ups like Jetpacks, Hoverboards, and Coin Magnets to help you survive longer. Your score increases with distance, coins, and level completion bonuses!
controls:
Arrow Left/A: Move to left lane
Arrow Right/D: Move to right lane
Arrow Up/W: Jump over low obstacles
Arrow Down/S: Slide under high obstacles
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: TDS - Tower Destiny Survive
description: Welcome to Tower Destiny Survive! You control a fortified tower defending against relentless zombie waves. Move your tower horizontally to collect valuable blocks while shooting down incoming zombies. Use collected blocks to upgrade your tower's health and firepower between levels. Survive three increasingly challenging levels filled with basic zombies, speedy runners, and tough tanks. Can you survive the zombie onslaught and emerge victorious?
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move tower horizontally
Space: Fire weapons at zombies
Enter: Start game from main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to main menu)

title: Territory Tides
description: Territory Tides is a turn-based strategy game where you must conquer territories to dominate the map. Each turn, you'll reinforce your armies, launch attacks on enemy territories, and fortify your borders. Capture all territories to advance through increasingly challenging levels. Control continents for bonus armies and eliminate AI opponents to achieve victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate and select territories (in combination with clicks)
Arrow Up/Down: Adjust army count for deployment, attack, or fortification
Space: Confirm actions (deploy armies, attack, fortify)
Shift: Advance to next phase of your turn
Z: Skip remaining phases and end your turn
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Throw Master 2D
description: You are a skilled throwing agent tasked with eliminating hostile enemies while protecting innocent hostages. Aim carefully and throw knives to take down enemies before they reach the hostages. Use exploding barrels to damage multiple enemies at once, and break wooden boxes to stun nearby foes. Complete all 5 levels by eliminating every enemy while keeping all hostages safe. Strategic thinking and precise aim are key to success!
controls:
Arrow Left: Rotate aiming direction counter-clockwise
Arrow Right: Rotate aiming direction clockwise
Space: Throw knife in aimed direction
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Traffic Jam
description: Navigate the red bus through a congested parking lot by sliding vehicles out of the way. Each vehicle can only move along its orientation (horizontal or vertical). Clear a path to the exit on the right side of the grid. Progress through increasingly challenging puzzles with more vehicles and tighter spaces. Can you master all levels?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move between vehicles to select them
Space: Grab/Release selected vehicle
Arrow Keys (while holding): Slide the grabbed vehicle in valid direction
R: Restart to main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
Enter: Start game from main menu

title: Block Blast!
description: Block Blast! is a puzzle game where you place geometric blocks on a 9x9 grid. Your goal is to fill entire rows or columns to clear them and earn points. You have three blocks available at a time, and must strategically place them to maximize your score. The game ends when you can't place any of the available blocks on the grid. Earn combo bonuses by clearing multiple lines simultaneously or consecutively!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move the selected block horizontally
Arrow Up/Down: Move the selected block vertically
Z: Cycle through available blocks
Space: Place the selected block on the grid
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart the game when game is over

title: Mega Man
description: Battle through six Robot Masters in any order you choose! Each defeated boss grants you their unique weapon with limited energy. Master tight platforming over deadly pits and spikes, learn boss attack patterns, and exploit their weaknesses with the right weapon. Use the Magnet Beam to create temporary platforms and reach hidden areas. After clearing the six stages, face the ultimate Wily fortress with disappearing block sequences and a brutal boss gauntlet. No health tanks—manage your resources carefully!
controls: Arrow Keys: Move left/right, Aim up/down • Space: Jump • Z: Shoot/Confirm • Shift: Cycle weapons • Enter: Start game • Esc: Pause/Unpause • R: Restart to title

title: Wild Arena
description: Welcome to Wild Arena! You are a lone animal warrior fighting for survival in a shrinking battlefield. Battle waves of enemy animals across 5 increasingly challenging levels. Defeat all enemies and survive the timer while avoiding the deadly shrinking zone that closes in around you. Collect health packs, weapon upgrades, and ability boosts to stay alive. Master your special ability and prove you're the apex predator!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move in 8 directions (Up, Down, Left, Right, and diagonals)
Space: Fire your weapon
Shift: Activate special ability (Dash forward)
Enter: Start game / Confirm menu selections
Esc: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Wild Frontier Rodeo
description: Welcome to Wild Frontier Rodeo! You're a fearless rider galloping through the wild frontier, leaping from animal to animal in an endless stampede. Each animal can only carry you for a limited time before bucking you off. Your mission: survive by continuously jumping to fresh mounts, avoiding deadly obstacles, and mastering the art of the rodeo. Complete all 5 levels by staying mounted and alive for the required time. Miss a jump and fall, and it's game over!
controls:
SPACE: Jump off current animal to land on another
LEFT ARROW: Steer animal left while riding
RIGHT ARROW: Steer animal right while riding
ENTER: Start game / Continue after level complete
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen
